agents_file.description: Primary system prompt and workspace rules

workspace_files.description: Core workspace definition files: SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, USER.md, TOOLS.md, HEARTBEAT.md, BOOTSTRAP.md

config.description: Agent configuration, model providers, exec approvals, channel settings

exec_approvals.description: Shell command approval policy (auto-approve vs require confirmation)

skills.description: Skill packages directory (each skill has SKILL.md entry point)

memory.description: Daily memory files (YYYY-MM-DD.md) and MEMORY.md for long-term

credentials.description: Credential storage (reference only, never copy actual secrets)
